headline: Sandisk (SNDK) Is Up 17.2% After New 2X Short ETF Launch And AI Storage Spotlight – Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In recent days, Tradr ETFs launched two new Cboe-listed 2X short leveraged products on single stocks, including the Tradr 2X Short SNDK Daily ETF, while Sandisk was also added to the NASDAQ Composite Index and presented at the NAB Show 2026. Together with intensifying AI-driven demand for NAND flash and strong analyst attention, these developments are reinforcing Sandisk’s role as a focused play on data center and AI storage infrastructure. With Sandisk gaining traction as an AI-focused...
